product_results.title: LUCKY STEP Women's Classic Fashion Sneakers Faux Leather Comfy Breathable Tennis Shoes Low Top Casual Walking Shoes Fashion Soft Lace-up Design Sneaker

summary.text: Customers find these shoes very comfortable, with feet not hurting after wearing them. The shoes fit true to size and appreciate the width in the toe area. The appearance receives praise for being pretty with beautiful stitching and accents. Customers describe the quality as great and consider them a good shoe overall. The colour is also appreciated by users.

authors_reviews.title: Quality amazing
authors_reviews.text: Sooooo cute and comfortableLove it so much.
authors_reviews.author: Yujin lee

authors_reviews.title: Order your regular size
authors_reviews.text: Ohhhh, these are cute cute!. I read a review that this shoe fits big, like a whole size, so I bought an 8.5 and a 9. I wear 8. Well they dont. I ordered these in an 8 and they fit just fine. Comfy. They are a true fit. I wear these without sock.....maybe an 8.5 would be good with socks but these shoes are a medium to wide fit...8.5 look a but too wide
authors_reviews.author: AM

authors_reviews.title: Beautiful shoe and very, very high quality.
authors_reviews.text: The quality of these shoes are insane. I ordered them for the office and they’re the same quality as $100+ shoes I own. The stitching and accents are beautiful. They definitely add some statement to any outfit. I’m so, so happy with this purchase. I ordered a size 9 and that’s my true size. The insoles are removable but lightly glued on the heel. I may be ordering some more colours.
authors_reviews.author: cmsimmons

authors_reviews.title: Lucky Step sneakers with a platform
authors_reviews.text: The shoes are nice looking and have got a lot of compliments on it!However these runners run on the bigger size . So keep in mind to order a size smaller!
authors_reviews.author: Harold Weinshenker

authors_reviews.title: Love them
authors_reviews.text: Love them so much, so comfortable Love the platform
authors_reviews.author: Tanya White

authors_reviews.title: Gave me blisters after only 2 hours, cute shoe otherwise
authors_reviews.text: they are cute, but a little hard to put on and they give me blisters when I walk in them for more than 2-3 hours. Great for regular work days but maybe not for a European vacation.
authors_reviews.author: Laura A.

authors_reviews.title: Not for wide feet
authors_reviews.text: Very nice shoe and I really wish that they had fit. I would say that I have moderate wide feet, I usually don't have problems fitting into most shoes, I couldn't even get my foot all the way in and I went up half a size.
authors_reviews.author: DH
